name: book_ride
description: Books a ride-hailing trip from a pickup address to a destination with support for scheduling and ride types.

pickup_location.description: Full address or landmark for the pickup point.

destination.description: Full address or landmark for the drop-off point.

ride_type.description: Category of ride to book. Defaults to 'economy'.

scheduled_time.description: Schedule the booking for a future time (ISO 8601). Omit for immediate pickup.
